title: CartCanvas

buildability.reason: Utilizes Shopify's cart drawer extension and App Bridge, requiring only front‑end JavaScript and a lightweight backend for image generation, enabling a 3‑day prototype, 3‑week MVP, and 10‑week production release.

speedToRevenue.reason: The app can be listed in the Shopify App Store, offers a free trial, and merchants can immediately start generating shareable content, generating revenue within the first billing cycle.

wedge.reason: A single button turns a checkout cart into a brand‑styled 9:16 PNG with a referral QR, ready for Stories.

distribution.reason: Targeting US fashion/beauty/wellness DTC brands with $50K–$500K revenue, the App Store and content marketing provide direct access to the $50K–$2M DTC market.

trapRisk.reason: No generative 3D/AR, real‑time voice/video, autonomous repricing, or multi‑app scope; the solution is a focused cart‑drawer extension.

expansion.reason: After initial share feature, the app can add multi‑platform sharing, analytics, and upsell widgets, scaling from €10K to €1M without pivot.

technicalSnapshot: CartCanvas is a Shopify App that installs a cart‑drawer extension via the Theme Extension API, uses Shopify App Bridge for secure communication, and calls the Storefront API to fetch cart items. The front‑end renders a 9:16 PNG mosaic using a lightweight image‑generation service, embeds a QR code generated client‑side, and stores configuration in the Shopify Admin API. Billing is handled through Shopify Billing API, and analytics are collected via the Shopify Analytics API.

v1Plan.day3: Deploy a basic Shopify app with cart‑drawer extension and a placeholder share button that displays a static PNG.
v1Plan.week3: Implement dynamic mosaic generation using an external image service, add QR code generation, brand styling options, and publish the app to the Shopify App Store.
v1Plan.week10: Add analytics dashboard, multi‑format sharing (Stories, Reels), subscription billing, and performance optimizations for production release.
